title: Wyper Pushes the War Forward
description: After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.
scene: Across pages 6, 8, 9, 10, this scene centers on Enel, Luffy, Gan Fall, Wyper, Sanji. After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Wait! Will you disband God's militia?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: That's something only God can know.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It burned right through that huge tree!!

summary: After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.
